[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000100 1
6 0010000000 1
7 0101000100 3

01 10 0000000101 2
12 21 0010000101 3
23 32 0111000110 5
34 43 0111000010 4
45 54 0101000000 2
56 65 0001000000 1
67 76 0000000011 2
70 07 0000000001 1

02 20 0000000101 2
13 31 0010000100 2
24 42 0111010010 5
35 53 0101001100 4
46 64 0011100010 4
57 75 1000000000 1
60 06 0000100001 2
71 17 1000000001 2

03 30 0000000100 1 match 5
14 41 0010000000 1 match 6
25 52 0101000100 3 match 7
36 63 0011000010 3
47 74 0000000010 1
50 05 0000000100 1 match 5
61 16 0010000001 2
72 27 0000000011 2

04 40 0000100000 1
15 51 1000000100 2
26 62 0011000011 4
37 73 0000000010 1
